notes: Two-leg XTI/XCU WTI-copper return-spread reversion basket from the approved EIA-CME-USGS-XTI-XCU-RSPREAD-2026 source packet and Chan pair-spread implementation lineage. The EA runs from the XTIUSD.DWX host setfile and reads both D1 close series to compute log(XTI return) minus beta times log(XCU return), standardized over a fixed lookback. Q02 must evaluate the logical basket, not standalone legs.
